jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropEquity - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
